common.footer: © 2026 by Jason Zhu | Senior Software Engineering Leader

showcases.title: Platform Modernization Initiative
showcases.subtitle: Leading a large-scale cloud migration and microservices transformation

features.title: Architecture Design
features.description: Designed and implemented a modern, scalable cloud-native architecture using microservices principles, containerization with Docker/Kubernetes, and event-driven patterns to replace the monolithic legacy system.

features.title: Team Leadership
features.description: Led cross-functional teams of developers, architects, and DevOps engineers through the complex migration process, ensuring clear communication and alignment on technical decisions and timelines.

features.title: Risk Management
features.description: Implemented comprehensive risk mitigation strategies including parallel running, canary deployments, and rollback procedures to ensure zero downtime and data integrity during the transition.

features.title: Performance Optimization
features.description: Achieved 60% reduction in latency, 40% cost savings, and 99.99% uptime through optimized caching strategies, load balancing, and auto-scaling capabilities in the new cloud infrastructure.

stories.title: The Challenge
stories.subtitle: Moving from Monolith to Microservices
stories.description: The organization was operating on a 15-year-old monolithic application that had become increasingly difficult to scale and maintain. The system experienced frequent outages, had long deployment cycles, and couldn't support the company's growth ambitions.
stories.footer: This transformation required careful planning, stakeholder management, and a phased approach to minimize business impact while maximizing technical improvements.

stories.title: The Solution
stories.subtitle: Building the Future Platform
stories.description: We implemented a comprehensive modernization strategy that included breaking down the monolith into independently deployable microservices, adopting containerization for consistency, and leveraging AWS services for scalability and reliability.
stories.footer: The new platform reduced operational overhead, improved developer productivity, and enabled the organization to deploy updates multiple times per day with confidence.

hero.title: Jason Zhu
hero.subtitle: Technology Management | Software Engineering | Team & Platform Builder
